Then explore — interact with the recommendations
These are live, interactive prototypes of the two recommendations — click through to experience the proposed seller flow firsthand.
Rec 1 — Concierge scheduling 01
Interactive · Opens in new tab
Rec 1: Replace the dead zone with a scheduling moment
After submitting, sellers choose how and when their concierge reaches out — phone or SMS, in 5 minutes or scheduled ahead. Their first Clever interaction is on their terms.
Channel selection Quick-time chips A/B experiment ready
Rec 2 — Seller dashboard 02
Interactive · Opens in new tab
Rec 2: Give sellers a place to land and a reason to engage
A personalized account with their home, progress tracker, local market data, and a preference module. Every selection updates the concierge brief in real time.
Progress tracker Live market data LLM agent brief
